summary_ja: raw-backlog-ingestバッチ（5記事）。全記事が既存Wikiで完全にカバー済み、または既にアーカイブ済み。MAI-Thinking-1 Tech Reportはconcepts/mai-thinking-1-tech-report.md(227行)+entities/mai-thinking-1.md(147行)で包括的カバー。BenchFlow Awesome Evalsはconcepts/ai-benchmarks/benchflow-tool.md(118行)に統合済み。Grant Sandersonはentities/grant-sanderson.md(160+行)に収録。CAIS/Drexlerはconcepts/cais.md+entities/k-eric-drexler.md(80行)で文書化済み。Adam Brown GRはAI/LLMスコープ外。Takes=0, References=0, Skips=5。

decisions.title: MAI-Thinking-1: Building a Hill-Climbing Machine — Microsoft AI Technical Report (109 pages)
decisions.reason_ja: ★☆☆☆☆ 8回以上アーカイブ済み。concepts/mai-thinking-1-tech-report.md(227行), entities/mai-thinking-1.md(147行), concepts/microsoft-mai-models.md(71行)の3ページが本レポートをソースとしてアーキテクチャ(LatentMoE, interleaved Dense/MoE, GQA)、訓練(30T pre-train, no synthetic data)、RL climb(modified GRPO, 3 domain-specialist models)、ベンチマーク(SWE-Bench Pro 52.8%, AIME 2025 97.0%, LiveCodeBench v6 87.7%)、hill-climbing framework、scaling ladder、8K GB200 training infrastructureを完全カバー。raw articleは全ページのsourcesに登録済み。
